english: Bowing my head to the Lord, son of Gauri, the Vinayaka
roman: Pranamya shirasa devam Gauri putram Vinayakam

english: The abode of devotees — remember him daily for attainment of long life, desire and purpose
roman: Bhaktavasam smaren nityam ayuh kama artha siddhaye

english: First is Vakratunda, second is Ekadanta
Third is Krishnapingaksha, fourth is Gajavaktra
roman: Tritiyam Krishna Pingaksham Gaja Vaktram chaturtham

hindi: लम्बोदरं पञ्चमं च षष्ठं विकटमेव च।
english: Fifth is Lambodara, sixth is Vikata
roman: Lambodharam panchamam cha shashtham Vikatam eva cha

english: Seventh is Vighnarajendra, eighth is Dhumravarna
roman: Saptamam Vighna Rajendram Dhumra Varnam tathashtamam

hindi: नवमं भालचन्द्रं च दशमं तु विनायकम्।
english: Ninth is Bhalacandra, tenth is Vinayaka
roman: Navamam Bhalachandram cha dashamam tu Vinayakam

english: Eleventh is Ganapati, twelfth is Gajanan
These twelve names — whoever reads them at the three junctions of the day
roman: Dvadashaetani namani trisandhyam yah pathen narah

hindi: न च विघ्नभयं तस्य सर्वसिद्धिकरं प्रभो॥
english: Has no fear of obstacles — O Lord, it brings all perfections
roman: Na cha vighna bhayam tasya sarva siddhi karam prabho
